Jean-Baptiste Greuze

10 works in the gallery.

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze
France · 1755–1765 · Black chalk

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze
France · 1759–1805 · Pen and brown ink

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze
France · 1761 · Black chalk with stumping
Head of Caracalla
by Jean-Baptiste Greuze
France, 18th century · c. 1768 · Red chalk on cream laid paper

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze
France, 18th century · 1763 · black and red chalk

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze

by Jean-Baptiste Greuze
